title: Redresso2's Throwable Explosives (RTE)
description: A collection of throwable explosives, which include TNT, fireballs and even Creepers.
body:
# RTE

## Dependencies:
- Minecraft
- Forge 1.20.1


Nothing else just these....

## Description:

A collection of throwable explosives, which include TNT, fireballs and even Creepers.

### 🎇 Features
💣 Throwable Creepers & TNT

Right–click on a Creeper or TNT block to snatch it into your inventory.

Be quick! These explosives are live and ticking. Throw them fast, or you’ll regret it.

🔥 Fire Charge/Fireball

Tired of Ghasts bullying you in the Nether? Now the tables turn.

Right–click to launch fireballs, just like a Ghast—finally giving you the power to fight fire with fire.
